summary: Comprehensive testing completed for updated Apartment Rent Payment Kiosk System with 5 new features. Auto-billing functionality working perfectly (100% success). All kiosk UI improvements implemented successfully. Complete payment flow works with auto-redirect. Admin dashboard features modern kiosk-style design with working toggle switches.
passed_tests: Backend auto-billing feature - 100% success rate (SRD 2800 rent paid, next month auto-added, service costs increased from 175 to 350)
Settings/admin gear icon correctly positioned in top-right of welcome screen
Settings icon correctly navigates to /admin/login when clicked
Modern tenant overview with 4 financial breakdown cards (Maandhuur, Openstaande huur, Servicekosten, Boetes)
Blue profile card with modern kiosk styling working perfectly
Financial values displaying correctly: Monthly SRD 2.800,00, Outstanding SRD 2.800,00, Service SRD 350,00, Fines SRD 0,00
Payment options screen with beautiful card layout - Volledige huur, Gedeeltelijk, Servicekosten, Boetes
Complete kiosk payment flow: welcome -> apartment selection -> tenant overview -> payment options -> automatic return to welcome
Auto-redirect after payment completion working (returns to welcome screen)
Admin dashboard with kiosk-style design - 23 rounded cards, 4/4 statistics displayed
Admin dashboard statistics: Total revenue SRD 81.100,00, Outstanding SRD 10.800,00, 4/6 apartments, 4 tenants
Admin horizontal navigation tabs working (5 tabs: Dashboard, Huurders, Appartementen, Betalingen, Stroombrekers)
Admin tenant management with 9 kiosk-style cards
Admin breaker panel with toggle switches - A101 OFF (red), others ON (green) with MOCKED integration notice
Authentication system working with session cookies
Dutch language interface throughout all screens
SRD currency formatting consistent across all components
Modern kiosk welcome screen with split layout (left content, right blue panel)
All kiosk screens using kiosk-root CSS class with proper styling
